tagline: BBB-accredited plumbing serving Cloverdale and north Sonoma County
seoDescription: Regina Plumbing is a BBB A+ accredited, family-run plumbing contractor in Cloverdale, CA serving Cloverdale, Healdsburg, Geyserville and north Sonoma County — repairs, water heaters, re-piping and septic. CSLB #857665.
heroSubheading: Regina Plumbing is a long-established, family-run plumber on N Washington St in Cloverdale, serving north Sonoma County with repairs, water heaters, re-piping and septic work. BBB A+ accredited and CSLB licensed.
aboutBody: Regina Plumbing is a family-run plumbing contractor based on N Washington Street in Cloverdale, serving Cloverdale, Healdsburg, Geyserville and the rest of north Sonoma County. Longtime neighbors know the Regina team as honest, experienced and efficient — the kind of local plumber who shows up, does the highest-quality work and charges a fair price.

From everyday repairs and water-heater installs to whole-house re-piping, septic and general service work, Regina Plumbing handles residential and commercial jobs across the north county. The company is fully licensed and insured under California contractor's license #857665 and is BBB A+ accredited (accredited since 2017).

services.title: Plumbing Repairs & Service
services.description: Diagnosis and repair of leaks, fixtures, drains and everyday plumbing problems for homes and businesses.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.description: Repair and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters, sized and installed to code.

services.title: Re-Piping
services.description: Whole-house and partial re-piping to replace aging or failing supply lines.

services.title: Septic & General Repairs
services.description: Septic service plus the full range of general residential and commercial plumbing repairs across north Sonoma County.

testimonials.quote: Regina Plumbing is outstanding, professional and does the highest-quality work at a fair price.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Cloverdale

notes: Sources: Yelp (yelp.com/biz/regina-plumbing-cloverdale, 4.8 stars / 51 reviews), BBB (bbb.org Healdsburg profile — A+ rating, accredited since 2017, 21 years in business, CSLB #857665), BuildZoom, Nextdoor. Website status = NO real website (only a Houzz directory listing on file at BBB) — a no-website target. NOTE: this Regina Plumbing operates from a Cloverdale storefront at 218 N Washington St (owner Alfred Peter Regina) and a Healdsburg mailing address 420 Moore Ln (BBB lists owner as Dean Young); same business / same CSLB #857665. There is a DIFFERENT, unrelated 'Regina Plumbing' in Redwood City (reginaplumbing.com) — do NOT use that site. Phone (707) 431-0300. Established year not reliably confirmed (BBB '21 years in business' implies ~2004 but left blank to avoid asserting). Trust signal = BBB A+ accreditation + CSLB #857665 + verified Yelp 4.8/51. Photo-less build.
